meaning: 扎黑丹[伊朗东南部城市](锡斯坦和俾路支斯坦省省会)
examples: When the earthquake struck this week, many people preferred to take their injured across the border to the city of Zahidan in Sistan province.
The road journey from Mashkel to Zahidan takes a few hours, compared with the 15 to 18 hours it takes to reach Balochistan's capital, Quetta.
